大小单双导师.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239149194_64551399<br>vk.com/topic-239149239_65344518<br>vk.com/topic-239218542_65163786<br>vk.com/topic-239218341_66213748<br>vk.com/topic-239183235_64469487<br>vk.com/topic-239149218_65064259<br>vk.com/topic-239218393_64721465<br>vk.com/topic-239226419_65344423<br>vk.com/topic-239149192_65163792<br>vk.com/topic-239183491_66213753<br>vk.com/topic-239218407_65996985<br>vk.com/topic-239199023_64721470<br>vk.com/topic-239181087_65996986<br>vk.com/topic-239142261_66213756<br>vk.com/topic-239149139_65344526<br>vk.com/topic-239183246_64874853<br>vk.com/topic-239213201_66213757<br>vk.com/topic-239218341_66213759<br>vk.com/topic-239183484_64551408<br>vk.com/topic-239183221_66213758<br>vk.com/topic-239183358_65064266<br>vk.com/topic-239149218_65064268<br>vk.com/topic-239218393_64721475<br>vk.com/topic-239149162_65163804<br>vk.com/topic-239218394_64551415<br>vk.com/topic-239218407_65996990<br>vk.com/topic-239149212_65163809<br>vk.com/topic-239142230_65618590<br>vk.com/topic-239199023_64721478<br>vk.com/topic-239142261_66213770<br>vk.com/topic-239183246_64874861<br>vk.com/topic-239183421_66213771<br>vk.com/topic-239149139_65344539<br>vk.com/topic
